scriptName: VS Code Folder-Only Context Menu Repair
description: Removes file/background context menu entries and keeps only the folder entry, then restarts Explorer.

messages.scriptDisabled: Folder-only repair is disabled in config.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.removingTarget: Removing context menu entry on target '{target}': {path}
messages.restartingExplorer: Restarting explorer.exe so context menu refreshes...
messages.done: Folder-only context menu repair completed successfully.
messages.completedWithWarnings: Repair completed with warnings -- check output above.
messages.rollbackBanner: VS Code Folder-Only Repair -- ROLLBACK (restore default entries)
messages.rollbackStart: Restoring default VS Code context menu entries on all three targets (file, directory, background).
messages.rollbackMissingTemplate: No defaultCommandTemplates.{target} entry for edition '{edition}' -- skipping target.
messages.rollbackVerify: Verifying restored state (all three targets must be present)...
messages.rollbackDone: Rollback completed successfully -- default entries restored on file, directory, and background.
messages.rollbackPartial: Rollback completed with warnings -- one or more targets did not restore. See errors above.
messages.rollbackExeMissing: Cannot restore edition '{edition}' -- VS Code executable not found. Skipping all targets for this edition.

commands.(default): Repair VS Code context menu so it appears ONLY on folders, then restart Explorer
commands.no-restart: Do the repair but do NOT restart explorer.exe
commands.rollback: Restore the DEFAULT VS Code installer entries on all three targets (file, directory, background). Inverse of the folder-only repair.
